name: Berlin
description: Street art, museums, markets, lakes, and neighborhoods that work well for a budget culture weekend.

name: Gothenburg
description: A coastal city with trams, archipelago islands, Haga cafes, markets, and forest lakes close to town.

name: Krakow
description: Low-cost food, old town streets, castle walks, Kazimierz cafes, and day trips to historic sites.

name: Prague
description: A romantic, walkable city with castle views, river islands, beer halls, gardens, and quiet early mornings.

name: Amsterdam
description: Canals, museums, markets, parks, and compact neighborhoods for an easy long weekend.

name: Budapest
description: Thermal baths, river views, grand cafes, ruin bars, and strong hotel value outside holidays.

name: Vienna
description: Museums, palaces, coffeehouses, parks, and polished public transport for a calm culture trip.

name: Lisbon
description: Sun, viewpoints, tiles, trams, seafood, and good off-season energy.

name: Porto
description: Riverside walks, tiled churches, wine cellars, bridges, and good-value stays.

name: Barcelona
description: Architecture, food markets, beach walks, neighborhoods, and shoulder-season warmth.

name: Rome
description: Ancient sites, piazzas, food, churches, and better walking weather outside summer.

name: Nice
description: Riviera sea views, old town lanes, train day trips, and spring/autumn warmth.

name: Paris
description: Museums, food, parks, covered passages, and lower prices on off-season weekdays.

name: Warsaw
description: Modern food, museums, parks, rebuilt old town, and excellent accommodation value.

name: Gdansk
description: Baltic harbor city with colorful streets, waterfront walks, amber shops, and easy food stops.

name: Riga
description: Old town, art nouveau streets, markets, river walks, and a strong-value Baltic weekend.

name: Tallinn
description: Medieval old town, design shops, saunas, viewpoints, and cozy winter atmosphere.

name: Hamburg
description: Harbor, Speicherstadt, food halls, parks, and a practical dog-friendly rail route.

name: Ystad
description: A compact Skane day trip with timbered streets, quiet cafes, dunes, and Sandskogen forest by the coast.

name: Skanor-Falsterbo
description: Soft beaches, colorful bath huts, birdwatching, and a calmer village feel on the southwestern coast.
